completed_tasks.name: Scaffold Next.js 16 app and install full dependency set
Create Supabase project and obtain credentials
Write .env/.env.example, drizzle.config.ts, src/db/index.ts, verify DB connectivity

remaining_tasks.name: Define Drizzle schema for 6 tables + apply initial migration
RLS policies migration (helper functions + CREATE POLICY for all 6 tables)
Login/logout Server Actions + /admin + /painel pages + verify-auth script

decisions.decision: Supabase project 'cardapio-boamidia' provisioned with 'Automatically expose new tables' enabled and 'Enable automatic RLS' disabled
decisions.rationale: 01-03's anon-key verification expects empty array (not permission error), requiring base PostgREST grants; RLS is enabled explicitly via versioned migration in 01-03 instead of an unmanaged Supabase event trigger

decisions.decision: DATABASE_URL uses Session pooler (port 5432) for drizzle-kit migrations; DATABASE_URL_RUNTIME uses Transaction pooler (port 6543, prepare:false) for app runtime queries
decisions.rationale: Per D-11 / STACK.md — required split for Supabase pooler compatibility

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase 1 — it will detect 01-01-SUMMARY.md exists and resume at Wave 2 (plan 01-02: Drizzle schema for restaurants/units/categories/products/product_availability/admin_users)
context_notes: Wave 1 (01-01) executed in a worktree, fast-forward merged into main, worktree cleaned up. Branching strategy is 'none' (work directly on main). Remaining waves: Wave 2 (01-02, sequential), Wave 3 (01-03 + 01-04, parallel), Wave 4 (01-05, has human-verify checkpoint at the end for manual browser confirmation of login/redirect/logout flow). Plan checker noted 01-VALIDATION.md has stale TBD placeholders — non-blocking, can be ignored or updated during execution.
